description_long: This chair features a rustic, handcrafted design with thick, uneven wooden planks forming the seat, backrest, and armrests. The wood is textured with deep, visible grain patterns and knots, giving it a rugged, natural appearance. Two wide, black metal bands with large bolts reinforce the backrest, adding both structural support and a decorative industrial touch. The armrests are broad and slightly angled, matching the robust style of the seat and back. The legs are sturdy, blocky, and made from the same wood, ensuring stability and durability. This chair is reminiscent of outdoor park or garden furniture, designed to withstand the elements while providing a comfortable, supportive seat.
description: A rustic wooden chair with thick planks, black metal bands, and a rugged, handcrafted appearance. The chair features a high backrest, broad armrests, and sturdy legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, high backrest with metal bands, and prominent armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden planks, the depth of the seat, and the vertical backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest, the metal bands, and the solid construction of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest and the layered construction of the seat and backrest.
